name: Fell from ladder in Salt Lake City at work, next steps?
description: Report today, file UT claim, get lawyer.

mainEntity.name: Fell from ladder in Salt Lake City at work, next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report today, file UT claim, get lawyer.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Seek medical care and report to employer immediately; file with Utah Labor Commission.**

Utah law requires notice within 180 days, but prompt action key. Local firms handle comp efficiently.

- Document site per OSHA.[7]
- Covers medical, TTD benefits.
- Recent Ackley case aids claims.[1]

Contact attorney familiar with SLC processes before insurer talks.
